summary: Excellent matrix recording of a stellar 1985 show highlighted by soaring "She Belongs To Me" and tight "Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain".
review: The matrix capture by Hunter Seamons balances audience ambience with soundboard clarity, delivering an almost flawless listening experience. Musically the performance shines – Jerry’s emotive vocals on "She Belongs To Me", a trippy Twilight Zone Space jam, and a crisp, tight "Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain" are repeatedly praised, with Brent Mydland providing strong support throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: One highly enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an outstanding show despite limited data points.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a perfect balance of audience and soundboard, describing it as one of the best matrices they've heard.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
Truckin' > Comes A Time > Around & Around
show_quality.setlist_flow: Pre‑drums segment praised as tight and trippy, first set described as "tasty", overall flow considered superb with seamless transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Solos soar and his tender, emotional vocals on "She Belongs To Me" are highlighted.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent provides great support throughout the show, contributing to its overall strength.
band_member_comments.Drums: Opening drum portion sounds just like the studio version; pre‑drums segment is tight.
